title: Poznań、Greater Poland — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Poznań、Greater Polandの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

PoznańはGreater Polandにある人口546,829の都市です。A major commercial and industrial hub in western Poland, famous for its Renaissance Old Town, Poznań International Fair, and goat-buttling clock tower.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
